---
title: "Bug-Hunt Stack"
---

# Bug-Hunt Stack

**Working seal:** `stack://bug-hunt-stack/08B5079286`

**Enter:** Use when a defect is real but the cause is not yet localized.


## Related Runes

- [1180 observability](../reference/house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd#rune-1180) - Enough internal evidence exists that you can infer what the system is doing from the outside. Not logs alone: legible state under pressure.
- [1204 trace {Proof}](../reference/house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd#rune-1204) - A preserved path through execution. Use it when the question is not only what failed, but where the causal thread first bent.
- [1172 invariant](../reference/house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd#rune-1172) - A law that must remain true while the rest of the system is allowed to move. If you cannot say the invariant, you probably do not yet understand the change.
- [1562 regression](../reference/house-failure-words-pathologies-and-counter-spells.qmd#rune-1562) - A previously solved bug or quality loss has returned.
- [1445 deterministic](../reference/house-guarantee-words-quality-attributes-and-behavioral-adjectives.qmd#rune-1445) - Given the same inputs, the same result should return. This is the antidote to drift, heisenbugs, and unreviewable behavior.


## Related Spell Templates and References

- [Bug Diagnosis From Logs](../spells/bug-diagnosis-from-logs.qmd)
- [Test Generation](../spells/test-generation.qmd)
- [Stack Grammar](../reference/stack-grammar.qmd)
- [Failure Modes](../reference/failure-modes.qmd)
- [Canon Map](../reference/canon-map.qmd)
| Step | Spell       | Artifact                           | Advance when                                       |
| ---- | ----------- | ---------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| 1    | Reproduce   | Stable reproduction                | The failure can be triggered on demand             |
| 2    | Localize    | Smaller suspect surface            | The search field is smaller                        |
| 3    | Instrument  | Logs, traces, asserts, or counters | New evidence can distinguish hypotheses            |
| 4    | Hypothesize | Likely failure mechanism           | Repair surface is stated                           |
| 5    | Patch       | Minimal change                     | Patch matches current hypothesis                   |
| 6    | Verify      | Regression sweep                   | Defect is gone and neighboring behavior is checked |

## Loop or Recursion

```json
{
  "steps": [
    2,
    3,
    4,
    5,
    6
  ],
  "until": "The bug is eliminated or evidence stops improving"
}
```


## On Fail

Escalate to a deeper diagnostic stack and preserve reproduction, traces, and rejected hypotheses.

## Why It Works

It prevents patching before localization.
